query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query (analytics_tier="Flex")  !(status_message="Query Failed")
| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
| where query_type matches "{{query_type}}"
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name, query_start_time, query_end_time
| query_end_time - query_start_time as query_time_range_hrs
| query_time_range_hrs / 3600000 as query_time_range_hrs
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| count (query) as query_count, sum(sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by query, user_name
| total_data_scanned_GB/query_count as %"Average Data Scanned per Query"
| fields query, query_count, %"Average Data Scanned per Query", total_data_scanned_GB, user_name
| format( "%.2f",%"Average Data Scanned per Query") as %"Average Data Scanned per Query"
| format( "%.2f",total_data_scanned_GB) as total_data_scanned_GB
| sort by total_data_scanned_GB
| limit 50

queryParameters.name: query_type
queryParameters.description: SLO,Interactive Dashboard,Interactive Search,Search API,Scheduled Views,Scheduled Search,Monitors

sources.dashboardDescription: The Feature Level Scan Volume dashboard provides visibility into the scan volume at a feature level in order to monitor and control cost at a feature level.

variables.name: query_type
variables.values: SLO,Interactive Dashboard,Interactive Search,Search API,Scheduled Views,Scheduled Search,Monitors
